calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Off Calendar

Motion To Request A Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Marrianne B. Sioson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DANIEL WILLIAMS.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) WILLIAM VALENTINE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Declarations filed in support of Default prove up are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $364,749.12
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $971.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $365,720.12
Judgment signed in open court.
